/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX13.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/rcp.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rcp.dir/src/commandline_options.cpp.o -o rcp  /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_program_options-mt.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_log_setup-mt.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_log-mt.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_chrono-mt.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_filesystem-mt.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_atomic-mt.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_regex-mt.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_thread-mt.dylib
